case_title: MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL INC. A CORPORATION VS. DENNIS LUKENS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MICHAEL C MCINTYRE RE:NON-SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL INC. A CORPORATION

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL INC.
